datamuseum 0.1.0
  • Reference

    datamuseum: Spatial and Taxonomic Data Utilities for Specimen Data Sets

    datamuseum-package.Rd

    Functions for cleaning, validating, and standardizing coordinate and taxonomic data in biological museum data sets.

    Coordinate Functions

    Functions for detecting, formatting, converting, and filtering latitude and longitude data.

    latlong_column, latlong_combine, latlong_convert, latlong_filter, latlong_format, latlong_hemisphere, latlong_limits, latlong_range, latlong_region, latlong_split

    Taxonomic Functions

    Functions for cleaning, validating, enriching, and formatting taxonomic names.

    taxon_add, taxon_cite, taxon_cleaner, taxon_column, taxon_columntype, taxon_combine, taxon_spellcheck, taxon_split, taxon_sort, taxon_validate

    Utilities

    General-purpose functions for specimen data set management.

    deduplicate, duplicate, italicize

    Example Data

    Superfamily Octopodoidea occurrence data sets for Japan compiled from five museum and biodiversity sources.

    BISMAL_Japan, GBIF_Japan, InvBase_Japan, NSMT_Japan, OBIS_Japan, museum, museum_taxon

    Contents

    Developed by Bryson Y. Torgovitsky, Cheryl L. Ames.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
